metodos.codigoOriginal:
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject([fSqlConector], .Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		With .poDataMgr
			.Addcursor('SigMvHst', 'CidChaves', 'CqSigMvHst', '', '')
			.AddCursor('SigMvCab', 'cIdChaves', 'crSigMvCab', '', '')
		EndWith 
		=DoDefault()
		
		ThisForm.getBarras.Value = []
		ThisForm.getCorAnt.Value = []
		ThisForm.getTamAnt.Value = []
		ThisForm.getCorNew.Value =... [TRUNCADO]

Local lnCodBars, lcTamNew, lcTamOld, lcCorNew, lcCorOld, llOk

lnCodBar = Thisform.getBarras.Value
lcTamNew = Thisform.getTamNew.Value
lcTamOld = Thisform.getTamAnt.Value
lcCorNew = Thisform.getCorNew.Value
lcCorOld = Thisform.getCorAnt.Value
llOk = .T.
_pData 	= Datetime()

lnCodBar = Iif(Type([lnCodBar])=[C],Val(lnCodBar),lnCodBar)

If Empty(lnCodBar)
	Messagebox([Favor Informar o Código de Barras.],0+64,[Atençăo])
	Return .F.
Endif

If Messagebox([Confirma a alteraçăo dos Dados do Barra?],4+3... [TRUNCADO]

Thisform.getCorAnt.Value = []
Thisform.getTamAnt.Value = []
Thisform.getCorNew.Value = []
Thisform.getTamNew.Value = []
Thisform.getCorAnt.Refresh
Thisform.getTamAnt.Refresh
Thisform.getCorNew.Refresh
Thisform.getTamNew.Refresh

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdCor', ;
						   'CrListaRemota', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	If (Lastkey() <> 27)
		This.Value = CrListaRemota.Cods
	Else
		This.Value = []
	EndIf
	Use In CrListaRemota
EndIf
This.Refresh
* Fim *********************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local loLista

If Not Empty(This.Value)
	loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdTam', ;
						   'CrListaRemota', 'Cods', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', .t.)

	If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro
		loLista.mAddColuna('Cods',  '', 'Código')
		loLista.mAddColuna('Descs', '', 'Descriçăo')
		loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	
	If (Lastkey() <> 27)
		This.Value = CrListaRemota.Cods
	Else
		This.Value = []
	EndIf
	
	Use In CrListaRemota
Else
	This.Value = ''
EndIf
This.Refresh
* Fim *********... [TRUNCADO]

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lStrQuery = [Select a.CPros,a.CBars, b.cbars_old ] + ; 		[From SigOpEtq a ] + ; 		[left join sigopeta b on a.cpros = b.cpros and a.cbars = b.cbars_new ] + ; 		[Where (a.CBars = ]+Alltrim(Str(lnCodBars,14))+[ or b.cbars_old = ]+Alltrim(Str(lnCodBars,14))+[) ] 	If Thisform.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lStrQuery,'CrEtiqs') < 1
